omitted_declarations.policy_reference: KYC / Identity verification data: selfie, government ID images and extracted fields (name, date of birth, document number, issuing country, validity), device/technical metadata (e.g. IP, device identifiers), and verification outcomes (pass/fail, risk signals, provider references).

Identity Data includes first name, last name, username, telephone numbers, country of residence, gender, driver's license, state ID, passport, passport card, permanent resident card, non-citizen travel document, visa, or similar identifier.
